rows.label: qev065302_MSG0001
rows.name:
Like petals dancing in the wind,
you all constantly toss me about!
Ah! Life exists within a profound and beautiful tornado![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hm...?
You've been staring at me quite intently...
Do you have something you wish to ask me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him what kind of personality he has.

rows.label: qev065302_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that Lyvia wants to meet him.

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0003
rows.name:
Let's see... If I had to describe myself in a single word,
perhaps... a poet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0004
rows.name:
I am a man who can continue to move the hearts of
the people around me with the passion hidden in my chest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hehe, I would love to whisper a poem of love
to a little kitten waiting for me somewhere out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Someone wants to meet me?
That must be a girl with quite an eye for quality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hehe, I have a policy of never turning down a lady's request.
I shall go and embrace her feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0008
rows.name: Little kitten... Be a good girl and wait for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0009
rows.name:
She is quite the adorable girl, isn't she.
To think such a girl would want to meet me...
Hehe, I am extremely delighted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065302_MSG0010
rows.name:
Not only is she cute, she is very charming...
I might end up falling for Lyvia
a little bit seriously.[ST:wait ]
